message:
Fix JSON5 partial Infinity/NaN keyword completion in streaming parser

stream.zig isScalarComplete prematurely marked partial JSON5 keywords
like "Inf", "Na", "-Inf", "+Na" as complete scalars. Added Infinity/NaN
prefix checking (with optional sign) and extended trailing number char
validation to cover JSON5 scalar start chars (+, .).

JS-side: extracted completeScalarKeyword helper for keyword autocomplete
in getValue(), adding JSON5 keyword completion (Infinity, NaN, signed
variants) alongside the existing true/false/null handling.
